emails.subject: CES and CEM
emails.body: CES and CEM I believe ENA is still agent for Columbia Energy Services and Columbia Energy Marketing on several pipelines. Rich Contos's (the only CES person I know) last day is this Friday. I left Rich a voicemail asking him if CES/CEM should continue to exist as a legal entity on the pipelines. As ENA, I believe I sould at least begin terminating the agency (and liability) relationships. Comments/questions??
